summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Flota module (Vehicles and Trailers). All 20 features tested and working correctly: vehicle/trailer CRUD, validation, auto-date calculations, vehicle-trailer linking (Tractocamión only), search, edit, and full flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Auto-date calculation logic is correct (1 year for Tarjeta/SOAT, 2 years for RTM if matrícula < 2 years)
Vehicle-trailer linking correctly restricted to Tractocamión class only
Validation covers all required fields with clear error messages
test_credentials: No authentication required for this feature
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test vehicle (TEST6CF) and trailer (RT7290) during full flow test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Flota module fully tested. Existing seed data: ABC123 (Tractocamión) linked to R12345 (Plana). All CRUD operations, validation, auto-date calculations, and linking features working correctly.

tests_executed.details: Page loads with Vehículos and Remolques tabs
Flota nav button present on Dashboard, Ofertas, CreacionOfertas, and Flota pages

tests_executed.test: Vehicle registration form - all fields present
tests_executed.details: All 13 vehicle fields found: placa, licencia, marca dropdown, línea, modelo, clase dropdown, carrocería, combustible dropdown, motor, VIN, propietario, identificación, fecha matrícula
Auto-calculates fecha_fin (1 year from fecha_inicio). Tested: 2025-06-01 → 2026-06-01
Auto-calculates fecha_fin (1 year from fecha_inicio). Tested: 2025-07-15 → 2026-07-15
For matrícula < 2 years, vigencia is 2 years from matrícula. Tested: matrícula 2025-06-01 → RTM fin 2027-06-01
4 file upload fields present: licencia_transito, soat, revision_tecnicomecanica, tarjeta_operaciones
Shows 'Campos obligatorios faltantes' with list of 20 missing fields
Backend returns 400 with 'Ya existe un vehículo con esta placa'

tests_executed.test: Trailer registration form - all fields present
tests_executed.details: All 5 trailer fields found: placa, tipo dropdown, VIN, ejes, capacidad
Shows validation errors for 5 required fields
Shows placa, marca, línea, modelo, clase, propietario, remolque columns
Clicking edit on ABC123 loads form with existing vehicle data
Shows placa, tipo, VIN, ejes, carga útil, vinculado a columns
Edit button present and functional
Vincular button only shown for unlinked Tractocamión vehicles
Modal shows dropdown with unlinked trailers only
Successfully linked TEST6CF to RT7290, unlink button appears for linked vehicles
Search works in both Vehículos and Remolques tabs

tests_executed.test: Full flow: Register vehicle, trailer, link
tests_executed.details: Created TEST6CF (Tractocamión), RT7290 (Furgón), linked them successfully
